description_long: This is a large, vintage-style wooden toolbox with a hinged lid that opens to reveal a well-organized interior. The inside of the lid features a star-shaped ornament, a map, and a book, along with several small bottles and containers neatly arranged in compartments. The main compartment is divided into sections, holding various bottles, a large book with ornate cover, and additional small containers. The exterior is finished in a dark, polished wood with metal corner reinforcements and a sturdy metal handle on the front. A wide drawer is integrated at the base, providing extra storage space. The overall design suggests a toolbox intended for specialized or delicate tools, possibly for scientific or magical purposes.
description: A large, dark wooden toolbox with a hinged lid, internal compartments, and a front metal handle. The interior is organized with bottles, books, and a lower drawer for extra storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open lid, internal compartments with bottles, books, and a star ornament, as well as the front drawer and handle.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the box, the internal compartments, and the arrangement of items inside.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the closed wooden back, metal handle, and no visible internal features.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the internal compartments and the arrangement of bottles and books from a different angle.
attribute_handle_type: Rectangular, fixed metal handle on the front, likely steel or iron, with a recessed grip for ergonomic carrying.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Keyhole-style lock mechanism on the front, likely metal, with no visible padlock or combination features.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Interior features multiple fixed compartments: upper lid with small bottle slots, a star ornament, a map, and a book; main body with divided sections for bottles, a large book, and small containers; one wide pull-out drawer at the base.
